description.value:
Archetype

Your Observation Haki has matured into something approaching a sixth sense. You perceive the world around you in a way ordinary senses cannot match.

  • Your imprecise sense range extends to 60 feet. Within 30 feet, the sense becomes precise — you can pinpoint exact locations of living and undead creatures even through walls, in darkness, or while blinded, as if you could see them normally.
  • Once per round as a free action, you may Seek without spending an action.
  • You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to disbelieve illusions and to saves against Deception-based effects (such as feints and deceptive spells).
  • Brief Future Sight: Once per day as a free action, you may reroll any one failed attack roll, saving throw, or Perception check before the result is resolved. You must use the new result.
description.gm: The precise sense within 30 feet effectively removes the concealed/hidden condition for creatures the character is aware of, within that range. This is strong but appropriate at level 12. The free Seek is meant to make Perception feel effortless — this character always knows what's lurking nearby. Brief Future Sight is once per day to prevent it from trivializing encounters, reflecting the early-stage version of this ability.
